name: Flame-Grilled Ribeye Steak
description: A thick-cut ribeye, seasoned simply with sea salt and cracked pepper, then grilled over open flame for a perfect char. Finished with garlic butter and fresh herbs.
side: Served with roasted potatoes and grilled vegetables

name: Smoky BBQ Chicken
description: Juicy chicken marinated in a house-made smoky barbecue sauce, slow-grilled to lock in flavor and finished with a caramelized glaze.
side: Served with coleslaw and corn on the cob

name: Lemon Herb Grilled Salmon
description: Fresh salmon fillet marinated in lemon, olive oil, and herbs, grilled until tender and slightly crisp on the outside.
side: Served with rice and seasonal greens

name: Grilled Beef Skewers
description: Tender chunks of marinated beef skewered with peppers and onions, flame-grilled for a smoky, juicy bite.
side: Served with flatbread and garlic sauce

name: Signature Flame Burger
description: A juicy grilled beef patty topped with melted cheese, caramelized onions, lettuce, and house sauce, served in a toasted brioche bun.
